observation_text:
The current candidate set was generated by the Relationship Manager module and the "Economic Indicator" observation that Manufacturing activity in the US continued to expand, with strength across selected electrical equipment industries. Initial candidate sets were reviewed by AI with review instructions. 
Companies primarily aligned to Electric Utilities business capability and the S&P500. This organisation provides a structured foundation for comparing related businesses and examining broader market sectors, including SPDR sector groupings, during subsequent market analysis.

Market Index: S&P500
S&P500 Sectors: XLE Energy: XLU Utilities: XLI Industrials: XLB Materials

NAICS Sectors
Electric Power Generation, Transmission And Distribution
Other General Purpose Machinery Manufacturing
Plastics Product Manufacturing
Electrical Equipment Manufacturing
